MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-27-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT STENSON-PACIFIC ELEVATOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE ONLY PARTY WHO MAY SUE OR FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT IS ONE WHO HAS BEEN NAMED AS A DEFEDANT OR CROSS-DEFENDANT IN A CURRENT PLEADING. UNDER THE STATUTE 428.10, THE REMEDY IS TO SEEK LEAVE TO INTERVENE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-09-2013 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-31-2013 AT 1:00 PM IN 210 WITH SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFFICER NEIL R. BARDACK.

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KENNETH LITTON OF HARDIMAN & CARROLL, LLP, TEL. NO. 248-3930 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The moving party provided courtesy copies of the moving papers as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B prior to the hearing. Notice was given to the opposing party after the tentative ruling came out. The court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: CROSS-DEFENDANT STENSON-PACIFIC ELEVATOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE ONLY PARTY WHO MAY SUE OR FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT IS ONE WHO HAS BEEN NAMED AS A DEFEDANT OR CROSS-DEFENDANT IN A CURRENT PLEADING. UNDER THE STATUTE 428.10, THE REMEDY IS TO SEEK LEAVE TO INTERVENE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
